summary: Added idle_timeout_s param, _last_chunk_ts tracking in receive(), and new tick() method (inserted between receive() and flush()); __init__ signature/docstring also touched. Should be additive and shouldn't conflict with debug logging as long as you don't restructure those same spots.

type: STATUS
files: dspy/streaming/streaming_listener.py
summary: Debug logging additions complete: added debug/debug_logger params in __init__, guarded DEBUG logs at start-detection/rolling-end-check/emit-chunk/flush/reset points. No new methods added, only inserted log lines inside existing branches - should merge cleanly with your idle_timeout_s/tick() additions as long as tick() doesn't duplicate the reset log block I added inside the stream_end/allow_reuse branch in receive().
